final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo of a muscular athlete performing a deadlift in a professional gym setting (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a gritty, high-contrast athletic editorial aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a dynamic low-angle or dramatic framing that emphasizes power and form — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include a muscular athlete with clearly defined muscle lines, mid-deadlift, with visible sweat on skin
Scene/backdrop: must include an industrial-style gym interior with raw textures — exposed metal, concrete, heavy equipment
Lighting/mood: needs a cool-toned, high-intensity atmosphere radiating masculine power and raw strength — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool, desaturated direction with steel and shadow tones — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs industrial surface treatment — metal, concrete, rubber flooring — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid: warm or soft tones, feminine aesthetics, cluttered or distracting backgrounds
